subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. In truth, it is even as thou hast written: without divine favours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق نامه شما رسید فی الحقیقه چنانست که مرقوم نمودی بی عنایات حق
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant
